The '''Battle of Bettel''' was a conflict between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] that took place in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] in the [[Bettel asteroid drift]] and in the [[Mev system/Legends|Mev system]]. The [[Corrupter repair convoy|''Corrupter'' repair convoy]] headed for the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'']] was destroyed in the battle.

===Background===
[[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] had revealed that the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'']] was damaged and unable to move. This likely occurred during the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. Due to extensive search efforts, they had little time to conduct the necessary repairs. The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] intercepted communications between the ''Corrupter'' and the [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] [[Monitor (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Monitor'']] that revealed a [[Corrupter repair convoy|convoy]] that would deliver new shipments to complete the repairs. The Rebels decided to send a strike force to destroy the convoy.

===The First Battle===
The Rebel [[Starfighter/Legends|fighters]] arrived at the [[Bettel asteroid drift]] where the convoy was attempting to reach [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. The [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] attempted to stop the fighters but were unsuccessful. The repair convoy was then successfully destroyed but the ''Monitor'' escaped into hyperspace. The Rebel fighters chased it into the [[Mev system/Legends|Mev system]], where the ''Corrupter'' was waiting for a repair convoy that was already destroyed.

The ''Monitor'' released all four [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttles]], which carried [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] [[Technician/Legends|technicians]], and its starfighters for cover. But that was ineffective as the ''Monitor'' made the mistake of releasing the shuttles too far away from the ''Corrupter'' and all were destroyed. The Rebel starfighters likely pulled back as they were prompted to by [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance Command]].

===Aftermath===
The attack was a huge success for the Rebels. They were then ready to make the final stage to escape the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces searching for them. With the convoy destroyed, the ''Corrupter'' was still stranded by the time the Rebels escaped into hyperspace and into another sector in space. In fact, the ''Corrupter'' had barely finished repairs, but the hyperdrive was still not working when they attempted to return to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==Behind the scenes==
It is possible for the player to destroy the ''Monitor''. Since the ship doesn't appear anywhere else in the game and no other source, it is likely it was destroyed.

The player can also attempt to destroy the ''Corrupter'', however unlike the case of ''Monitor'', the scenario demands the ship to appear again later. In order for the continuity to be maintained, if the player brings the ''Corrupter''{{'s}} shields down, [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]] from [[Avenger Squadron]] appear. They are armed with Concussion missiles and can be difficult to defeat, ensuring therefore the survival of the ''Corrupter''.
